## Release Checklist

- [ ] I submitted only the final selected app package, not AI draft attempts
- [ ] `app.json.id` matches the `.echo` manifest id
- [ ] `app.json.version` matches the `.echo` manifest version
- [ ] `app.json.update_source` matches the `.echo` manifest update source
- [ ] New app is listed in `catalog.json`
- [ ] Existing app keeps the same `id` and `app_path`
- [ ] `changelog.md` updated

## Validation

- [ ] `node scripts/validate.js`
- [ ] App can be installed in EchoBraid
- [ ] Update check works if this PR publishes a newer version
